# User Steering Points

These are running knowledge items set by the user — similar to knowledge items in Devin.
They are **steering pointers**: important choices, preferences, and context the user wants the agent to respect and carry forward across every dev-test cycle.
They are not exhaustive project documentation. Treat each item as a direct instruction from the user.

---

## Active Steering Points

<!-- Each bullet is a user-set pointer. Add new ones as the user shares them. Never delete unless the user says so. -->

- Frontend base URL: http://localhost:5174/
- Backend (FastAPI) base URL: http://localhost:8000
